accepted_cases: valid provider response creates replay-visible proposal envelope
provider proposal envelope contains no authority metadata
malformed empty provider response fails closed
OpenAI, Claude, Codex, Gemini, and local LLM identities use the same adapter contract

deterministic_acceptance_evidence.proposal_hash: computed from canonical serialized proposal envelope
deterministic_acceptance_evidence.provider_identity_hash: computed from canonical serialized provider metadata
deterministic_acceptance_evidence.replay_hash: computed from canonical serialized replay wrapper
deterministic_acceptance_evidence.reconstruction: provider identity, provider version, request, response, timestamp, and proposal hash reconstruct from replay
